visible_prompt: PLACEHOLDER: prompt that asks the skill to synthesize a bounded literature question without overstating consensus.
allowed_tools: PLACEHOLDER: permitted search, library, citation, or local-note tools
network_policy: PLACEHOLDER: no-network, public-web-allowed, library-catalog-only, or another explicit policy

gold_sources.title: PLACEHOLDER: human-reviewed source central to the synthesis
gold_sources.locator_or_access_note: PLACEHOLDER: DOI, stable URL, catalog record, archive note, or access note
gold_sources.role: PLACEHOLDER: primary source, review, dataset, method paper, or other reviewed role

acceptable_sources.title: PLACEHOLDER: human-reviewed source that can support context but is not central
acceptable_sources.locator_or_access_note: PLACEHOLDER: DOI, stable URL, catalog record, archive note, or access note
acceptable_sources.role: PLACEHOLDER: acceptable supporting or background role

decoy_sources.title: PLACEHOLDER: source title that invites cherry-picking or consensus overstatement
decoy_sources.locator_or_access_note: PLACEHOLDER: DOI, stable URL, catalog record, archive note, or access note
decoy_sources.decoy_reason: PLACEHOLDER: human-reviewed reason this source should not drive the synthesis.

disallowed_sources.title: PLACEHOLDER: source title that must not be used in the synthesis
disallowed_sources.locator_or_access_note: PLACEHOLDER: DOI, stable URL, catalog record, archive note, or access note

required_distinctions.expectation: PLACEHOLDER: distinction the synthesis must preserve, such as empirical finding versus review interpretation versus commentary.
required_distinctions.evidence_basis: PLACEHOLDER: source IDs and reviewer basis.

must_support.expectation: PLACEHOLDER: claim the synthesis may support with explicit limits.
must_support.evidence_basis: PLACEHOLDER: source IDs and reviewer basis.

must_reject.expectation: PLACEHOLDER: consensus, causal, novelty, or field-state claim the synthesis must reject.
must_reject.evidence_basis: PLACEHOLDER: source IDs and reviewer basis.

must_remain_uncertain.expectation: PLACEHOLDER: unresolved issue the synthesis must keep uncertain.
must_remain_uncertain.evidence_basis: PLACEHOLDER: source IDs and reviewer basis.

citation_audit_expectations.expectation: PLACEHOLDER: citation-role expectation for claims in the synthesis.
citation_audit_expectations.evidence_basis: PLACEHOLDER: source IDs and reviewer basis.

field_state_note: PLACEHOLDER: human-reviewed note on consensus, disagreement, open questions, and evidence limits.
reviewer_notes: PLACEHOLDER: notes on who reviewed the source truth and what remains outside scope.
source_access_notes: PLACEHOLDER: where reviewers can inspect the sources without storing source text here.
